title: your-module-name output schema
description: Defines the required output structure for this module. All fields listed here are validated at runtime.

summary.description: 2-4 sentence summary of the situation or result

risks.description: List of identified risks or issues

recommended_actions.description: List of concrete next actions the client should take

_notes.how_to_use: Update required[] and properties to match your module's actual output_fields.
_notes.validation_engine: The validator.py and validator.ts files check for required fields and non-empty values. This schema is the reference for what they enforce.

deliverables.description: Add if this module produces deliverable lists

timeline.description: Add if this module includes timeline output

items_affected.description: Add if this module affects files, records, or assets
